events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Moves Like Jagger
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV launched, playing 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just make them bigger?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Mad for it
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from the album that defined a generation?

events.title: Woodstock Festival opened 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Imagine being there!

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legacy continue to shake up the world.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the shooting of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas, who later died on September 13th, and would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, 30 years since that fateful night in Vegas. His voice still resonates.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: That Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since 'Abbey Road' dropped. Still one of the most famous album covers of all time, but what's your top track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Britpop legend and former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (UK re-release)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK in 1975, spreading its message of peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine' all the people... 51 years since John Lennon first released this powerful message. Still as relevant today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: 25 years since the iPod changed how we listen to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary artist and peace activist, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: A Day to Imagine
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember John Lennon – a true icon whose message of peace still resonates.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the inimitable John Cleese! What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their sprawling, self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Wonders
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A double album of pure genius – what's your standout track?
